lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. It has been maintained in its original state.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows some typical wear including minor scratches and paint chips, while the interior has a few stains on the upholstery. Despite these cosmetic imperfections, it remains mechanically reliable and has been regularly maintained.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning, showroom-ready vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, boasting a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that looks and feels like it just left the dealership. This car has been meticulously cared for and is ready for a new owner who appreciates a vehicle in top-tier, like-new shape. A rare find for the most discerning driver!

This vehicle is in mint, showroom-quality condition. It has been meticulously cared for, with the exterior paint shining like new and an interior that remains flawless and free of any wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect, providing a smooth and powerful driving experience as if it just left the dealership. All service records are up to date, and every feature functions exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in pristine, original state.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound with minor wear. The exterior and interior show some light signs of use but are well-maintained.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits a showroom-fresh aesthetic, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in an original, undisturbed state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive example of automotive engineering in its most pristine form.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Chassis integrity is absolute, with zero subframe fatigue and a suspension geometry that retains factory-spec kinematics. Every bushing remains pliable, and the engine bay is devoid of thermal cycling wear or fluid seepage. This is a turn-key collector piece with a documented service history including recent rod bearing prophylaxis and shim-and-bucket valve adjustments.
Used car. Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards and presenting in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating and always stored in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery retains its original factory scent and shows no signs of wear, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history from authorized dealers and a low-mileage engine that runs with absolute precision. From the spotless undercarriage to the untouched alloy wheels, this car represents a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning enthusiast to own a truly immaculate example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards of automotive excellence. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, reflects a level of care that is truly rare in the secondary market. This vehicle represents a peerless opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a specimen that presents in as-new condition. Mechanically sound and aesthetically impeccable, it stands as a testament to superior engineering and fastidious ownership.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies peak engineering and has been preserved with meticulous care, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior, reflects a standard of excellence that satisfies the most discerning collector. Truly a peerless acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely stunning shape—seriously, it looks and feels brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and always parked in the garage. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh, clean feel inside. If you're looking for something that’s been loved and kept in perfect order, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a pristine example of the legendary E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit boasts a broad torque curve and immediate throttle response via its six individual throttle bodies. Mechanically flawless, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the double-VANOS system has been
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless exterior and interior.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards and presenting in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or swirl marks, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen inclement weather. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking the finest example available on the market, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate machine that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled refinement. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, preserving its original showroom luster and mechanical integrity. Every surface and component reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver a peerless experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. This represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle in truly superlative condition.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, currently maintained in documented showroom condition. This specimen represents the definitive standard for the model, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state. Meticulously curated and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. Rare in both preservation and presentation, it stands as a premier acquisition for those who demand absolute excellence.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty. It's honestly in pristine condition—looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that's practically perfect, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a pristine E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated VANOS system. This example boasts a reinforced subframe and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, ensuring maximum torsional rigidity and mechanical engagement. Meticulously
Pristine condition. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous care. This car is in breathtaking, pristine condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every surface has been preserved with the utmost attention to detail; it has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen rain or snow. The upholstery is supple and unmarked, while the dashboard and trim are free of any wear or sun damage. Mechanically, the car performs flawlessly, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by certified specialists. For the buyer seeking perfection, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. All original keys, manuals, and records are included.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than automotive perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered, garage-kept, and meticulously cared for. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one. You really won't find another one this clean!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is perfectly synchronized with a recent comprehensive VANOS overhaul, and the rod bearings have been addressed for preventative longevity. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement already performed. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal lateral traction. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior bolsters show zero signs of fatigue. Mechanical integrity is absolute, from the bushing-tight multi-link rear suspension to the fade-free cross-drilled rotors. A turn-key specimen for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless. Service records available.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the alloy wheels remain pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin retains that signature new-car scent, featuring supple, untouched leather seating and high-tech displays that are crystal clear and fully functional. Mechanically, this car is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a complete, documented maintenance history included. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, it performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection and refuses to settle for anything less than a time-capsule quality vehicle, this example is unmatched.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of wear. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new machine, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such caliber and provenance.
